message:
feat(robot): Add distribute mode with triage-based work assignment

Extends the assignment system with distribute mode for automated work
distribution from bv triage to idle agents, plus robot-triage output.

Assignment API (assign.go:86-191):

1. DistributeRecommendation struct
   - BeadID, Title: Work item identification
   - PaneIndex: Target agent pane
   - AgentType: claude/codex/gemini
   - Reason: Assignment rationale

2. GetAssignRecommendations()
   - Returns []DistributeRecommendation for distribute mode
   - Validates session exists
   - Normalizes strategy (balanced default)
   - Detects idle agents via scrollback analysis
   - Gets ready beads from bv
   - Optional bead filtering via opts.Beads
   - Uses generateAssignments() for matching

Robot triage API (robot.go:3973-4064):

1. TriageOptions struct
   - Limit: Max recommendations per category

2. TriageOutput struct
   - GeneratedAt, Available, DataHash, Error
   - QuickRef: *bv.TriageQuickRef
   - Recommendations, QuickWins, BlockersToClear
   - ProjectHealth: *bv.ProjectHealth
   - Commands: Map of useful commands
   - CacheInfo: Cache metadata

3. PrintTriage()
   - Validates bv installation
   - Gets triage data (uses internal cache)
   - Applies limits to recommendation lists
   - Includes cache validity and TTL info

BV extensions (bv.go:838-897):

1. GetRecentlyCompletedList()
   - Returns done beads ordered by completion time
   - For recovery context awareness

2. GetBlockedList()
   - Returns beads blocked by dependencies
   - For blocker awareness in recovery

Test coverage:
- assign_test.go: GetAssignRecommendations scenarios
- robot_test.go: PrintTriage output validation
- coordinator/assign_test.go: Strategy behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
